flags.name: Income variance > 15%
flags.explanation: Stated income on 1003 differs from pay stub by 19.57%. Threshold is 15%.

flags.name: DTI in caution zone
flags.explanation: DTI of 47% is in the 43-50% caution zone. Near agency limits.

flags.name: LTV above 90%
flags.explanation: LTV of 90.5% exceeds 90%. PMI required, elevated default risk.

flags.name: Credit score below 720
flags.explanation: Credit score 718 is below the 720 preferred threshold.

flags.name: Monthly payment to income ratio
flags.explanation: Monthly payment is 42.0% of verified income. Above 35% guideline.
